stemHtml: Which of the following sets of conditions are most favourable to the development of thunderstorms?

options.a: Extensive isothermal layer, ice particles and water droplets must exist just below the freezing level and orographic lifting.
options.b: Environmental lapse rate less than dry adiabatic lapse rate with freezing level below the cloud base, high relative humidity and strong surface winds.
options.c: Environmental lapse rate greater than saturated adiabatic lapse rate through a great vertical extent, high relative humidity and an initial lifting process.
options.d: Environmental lapse rate less than saturated adiabatic lapse rate with dew point below 0°C and considerable surface heating.
